title: Apply complex instrumental techniques
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply complex instrumental techniques demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Establish client needs

pcs.text: Liaise with client or sample provider to determine client needs and sample history
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Liaise with client or sample provider to determine client needs and sample history?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Liaise with client or sample provider to determine client needs and sample history.

pcs.text: Match sample provided to accompanying documentation and report any discrepancies in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Match sample provided to accompanying documentation and report any discrepancies in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Match sample provided to accompanying documentation and report any discrepancies in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify non-routine samples and the possible need to vary workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify non-routine samples and the possible need to vary workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify non-routine samples and the possible need to vary workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Seek advice from supervisor about any proposed variations and document all approved changes.
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek advice from supervisor about any proposed variations and document all approved changes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek advice from supervisor about any proposed variations and document all approved changes.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Establish client needs

elements.title: Prepare samples and standards

pcs.text: Obtain a representative analytical portion of the laboratory sample
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain a representative analytical portion of the laboratory sample?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain a representative analytical portion of the laboratory sample.

pcs.text: Prepare sample in accordance with testing requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare sample in accordance with testing requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare sample in accordance with testing requirements.

pcs.text: Prepare validation checks and/or calibration standards for analytical portions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare validation checks and/or calibration standards for analytical portions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare validation checks and/or calibration standards for analytical portions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare samples and standards

elements.title: Set up and optimise instrument and sub-systems

pcs.text: Perform pre-use and safety checks in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform pre-use and safety checks in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform pre-use and safety checks in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Assemble appropriate instrument sub-systems to construct the required analytical path
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble appropriate instrument sub-systems to construct the required analytical path?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble appropriate instrument sub-systems to construct the required analytical path.

pcs.text: Start up and condition the instrument in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Start up and condition the instrument in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Start up and condition the instrument in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Check and optimise each instrument sub-system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and optimise each instrument sub-system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and optimise each instrument sub-system.

pcs.text: Optimise instrumental parameters to suit sample and test requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Optimise instrumental parameters to suit sample and test requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Optimise instrumental parameters to suit sample and test requirements.

pcs.text: Check calibration status of instrument and perform any required calibration using specified standards and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check calibration status of instrument and perform any required calibration using specified standards and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check calibration status of instrument and perform any required calibration using specified standards and procedures.

pcs.text: Clean, care for and store equipment and consumables in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, care for and store equipment and consumables in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, care for and store equipment and consumables in accordance with workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Set up and optimise instrument and sub-systems

elements.title: Perform analysis

pcs.text: Measure analyte response for standards, validation checks and samples
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure analyte response for standards, validation checks and samples?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure analyte response for standards, validation checks and samples.

pcs.text: Conduct sufficient measurements to obtain reliable data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct sufficient measurements to obtain reliable data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct sufficient measurements to obtain reliable data.

pcs.text: Return instruments to standby or shutdown condition in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Return instruments to standby or shutdown condition in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Return instruments to standby or shutdown condition in accordance with workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Perform analysis

elements.title: Process, analyse and record data

pcs.text: Confirm data are the result of valid measurements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm data are the result of valid measurements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm data are the result of valid measurements.

pcs.text: Perform required calculations and ensure results are consistent with standards or estimations and expectations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform required calculations and ensure results are consistent with standards or estimations and expectations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform required calculations and ensure results are consistent with standards or estimations and expectations.

pcs.text: Record results with the appropriate accuracy, precision, uncertainty and units
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record results with the appropriate accuracy, precision, uncertainty and units?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record results with the appropriate accuracy, precision, uncertainty and units.

pcs.text: Analyse trends in data and/or results and report out-of-specification or atypical results promptly to appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse trends in data and/or results and report out-of-specification or atypical results promptly to appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse trends in data and/or results and report out-of-specification or atypical results promptly to appropriate personnel.

pcs.text: Troubleshoot analytical procedure or equipment problems which have led to atypical data or results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Troubleshoot analytical procedure or equipment problems which have led to atypical data or results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Troubleshoot analytical procedure or equipment problems which have led to atypical data or results.

pcs.text: Follow procedures to ensure traceability of sample from receipt to reporting of results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow procedures to ensure traceability of sample from receipt to reporting of results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow procedures to ensure traceability of sample from receipt to reporting of results.
